name: White Rice

pros.title: useful staple energy source
pros.explanation: That matters because grains are often judged by how practical they are in real diets.

pros.title: easy to batch cook at scale
pros.explanation: That practicality is part of why grains matter.

pros.title: works as a meal anchor
pros.explanation: A lot of value comes from being easy to build around.

cons.title: quality can drop fast with processing
cons.explanation: The grain category punishes refinement pretty hard.

cons.title: carb load is still the main burden
cons.explanation: That is the category risk no grain fully escapes.

cons.title: protein quality is limited
cons.explanation: Even the better grains usually need pairing.

sourceNotes: Expanded dataset sample for FoodRanked pressure-testing.
Values are approximate representative placeholders for category tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
